bigquery_test_connection.name: bigquery_test_connection
bigquery_test_connection.description: Test BigQuery connection using the configured datasource. Returns a descriptive string indicating success or failure with connection details.

datasource_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

bigquery_get_schema.name: bigquery_get_schema
bigquery_get_schema.description: Get BigQuery dataset schema information including table structures. Returns formatted text showing tables and their column details.

datasource_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

bigquery_get_table_names.name: bigquery_get_table_names
bigquery_get_table_names.description: Get list of table names from BigQuery dataset. Returns formatted text with numbered list of tables and count.

datasource_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

bigquery_insert_rows.name: bigquery_insert_rows
bigquery_insert_rows.description: Insert rows of data into a BigQuery table. Returns descriptive string confirming insertion success or detailing any errors.

datasource_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

table_name.description: Name of the table to insert data into

data.description: Array of objects representing rows to insert

bigquery_execute_query.name: bigquery_execute_query
bigquery_execute_query.description: Execute a custom BigQuery SQL query using the configured datasource. Supports both dry runs for validation and actual execution. Returns descriptive string with execution status and job details.

datasource_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

use_legacy_sql.description: Whether to use legacy SQL syntax (default: false)

dry_run.description: Whether to perform a dry run for query validation without execution (default: false)

querying_knowlegebase.name: querying_knowlegebase
querying_knowlegebase.description: Query the knowlegebase using the configured datasource. Returns a descriptive string indicating success or failure with connection details.

kb_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

inference_id.description: UUID of the configured BigQuery datasource

send_email.name: send_email
send_email.description: Send an email to the specified recipient. Returns a descriptive string indicating success or failure of the email delivery process.

email_id.description: Email address of the recipient to whom the message will be sent

trigger_message_processor.name: trigger_message_processor
trigger_message_processor.description: Execute a message processor function. This template gets expanded into individual tools for each message processor.

trigger_api_service.name: trigger_api_service
trigger_api_service.description: Execute an API service. This template gets expanded into individual tools for each API.
